test.notes: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or the root package.json, and the mission guidance for this refactoring milestone says no E2E tests are needed.

typecheck.notes: Per mission AGENTS.md, root type checking is validated through the build pipeline rather than a separate tsc command; this rerun completed successfully and built the scoped packages without new type failures.

lint.notes: Lint exited 0 with warnings only across @documenso/ui, @documenso/trpc, and @documenso/lib; no errors blocked this rerun.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/client-side-data-fetching.md documenting versioned localStorage migration expectations, the concrete field-meta schema pair for persisted field-meta objects, and the shared resize-listener singleton hook pattern plus remaining intentionally separate resize listeners.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a client-storage persistence guideline: when versioning localStorage keys, read and validate the new key first, then explicitly migrate or honor legacy unversioned values before deleting them.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original client-localstorage-schema review found that apps/remix/app/components/general/verify-email-banner.tsx:69-91 and packages/ui/primitives/document-flow/field-item-advanced-settings.tsx:172-199 both introduced versioned keys, but the advanced-settings path dropped existing legacy drafts instead of migrating them. The rerun fix-localstorage-migration review confirmed the correct read-validate-migrate-delete pattern, while the mission AGENTS.md still contains no browser-storage guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand VAL-CLIENT-002 so it explicitly requires preserving or migrating valid legacy localStorage values during schema versioning, not just adding a versioned key and validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: VAL-CLIENT-002 currently says the two localStorage usages should include a version key and validation, while the feature description also required graceful handling of old data. That gap allowed client-localstorage-schema to satisfy the contract wording while still regressing stored drafts and dialog cooldown timestamps until fix-localstorage-migration landed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce that narrowly scoped refactors should avoid incidental formatter-only or Tailwind class-order churn, or split that noise into a separate change before finishing the feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The client-passive-listeners review found unrelated class-ordering hunks in packages/ui/primitives/multiselect.tsx and packages/ui/components/document/envelope-recipient-field-tooltip.tsx bundled into commit beff112d6ac22843ad82192390535c7abecef9c5 alongside the real passive-listener changes.

rejectedObservations.observation: Persisted field-meta readers should use the concrete ZFieldMetaNotOptionalSchema/TFieldMetaNotOptionalSchema pair when they expect a real field-meta object.
Document the module-level singleton client-hook pattern used by useSharedResize for shared browser listeners.
Record which remaining direct resize listeners were intentionally excluded from the shared resize refactor.
Mission AGENTS.md still lacks browser-storage migration guidance even though .factory/library/client-side-data-fetching.md now documents it.
